raw_consumer_statement: I am being charged {$1000.00} for a credit card used in XXXX. I have NOT used the card since XX/XX/year>. That card expired. I told them It is fraud and they closed the account. However, I am still expected to pay XXXX I REFUSE to pay. I have not heard anything from them since the last letters from XXXX regarding the issue. No updates, nothing and I am worried. The credit card is from BestBuy/Citibank .
